description: Evaluates facilities management service maturity—physical access control, equipment identification, surveillance, unauthorized access training, cabling security, environmental systems, secure utilities, and equipment location.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A facilities management service exists and is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Facilities management KPIs and KRIs—including physical access incidents, environmental excursions, and utility test compliance—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Physical access and environmental excursion metrics

capabilities.name: Controlled Access Points and Secure Area Authorization
capabilities.description: Physical access to data centers is controlled and functional zones are physically separated.
evaluation_focus: Physical access control to data centers

capabilities.name: Equipment Identification
capabilities.description: Accurate equipment identification validates physical asset placements and is reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Accurate equipment identification for asset placement

capabilities.name: Surveillance System
capabilities.description: Surveillance at all data centers identifies and calls out unauthorized or anomalous access.
evaluation_focus: Data center surveillance for unauthorized access

capabilities.name: Unauthorized Access Response Training
capabilities.description: Formal training on unauthorized data center access is provided for all data center personnel.
evaluation_focus: Formal unauthorized access training for DC personnel

capabilities.name: Cabling Security
capabilities.description: Power and telecommunication cables receive risk-based protection from interception, interference, or damage at all facilities.
evaluation_focus: Risk-based cabling protection at all facilities

capabilities.name: Environmental Systems
capabilities.description: Data center environmental control systems monitor, maintain, and test temperature and humidity within industry standards.
evaluation_focus: Environmental monitoring and testing within industry standards

capabilities.name: Secure Utilities
capabilities.description: Utility services are secured, monitored, maintained, and tested at planned intervals.

capabilities.name: Equipment Location
capabilities.description: Business-critical equipment is kept away from locations with high probability of environmental risk events.
evaluation_focus: Business-critical equipment away from high environmental risk locations

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
